disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Right-upper abdominal pain that has been continuous for about 10 hours, beginning after a heavy fatty meal
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and when did it start?
Has the pain come and gone, or has it stayed constant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's high up on the right side under my ribs. It started after a big dinner last night and it has just stayed — it hasn't eased off at all in about ten hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The pain bores through to the right shoulder blade
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain move or spread anywhere?
Do you feel it in your back or shoulder?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it drills through to my right shoulder blade.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fever and shivering that developed early this morning, after the pain began
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or chills?
Do you feel hot or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Since early this morning I've been really hot and shivery — that's new, I never got a fever with the old attacks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent nausea with repeated bile-stained vomiting and complete loss of appetite; cannot keep fluids down
trigger_question_examples: Have you been vomiting? What does it look like?
Can you keep any food or fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep throwing up — it's greenish, like bile — and I can't face any food. I can't even keep water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Previous similar right-upper pains after fatty food that were short-lived and settled by themselves, never with fever
trigger_question_examples: Have you had pain like this before?
What happened with the previous episodes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had right-side tummy attacks after rich food before, but they always passed within a couple of hours on their own — this one won't stop, and I never had a fever with them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Moving worsens the pain; the patient stays very still and guards the right side (patient-reported behaviour, not an examination finding)
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Moving really sets it off, so I'm lying dead still and bracing my right side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications; the only thing taken was overnight paracetamol, which was vomited
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
Have you taken anything for this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular medicines. I took a couple of paracetamol overnight but brought them straight back up.
